case_title: JOHNSON, DAVID vs. HART, ARTHUR et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HART, ARTHUR THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 225 FELL ST #22, LEASE FORFEITED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT HART, ARTHUR
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HART, ARTHUR
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT HART, ARTHUR
DECLARATION RE: LOST LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, DAVID
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HART, ARTHUR

AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $202.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $325.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT HART, ARTHUR
DECLARATION IN LIEU OF PERSONAL TESTIMONY FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, DAVID

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $793.91 AS TO DEFENDANT HART, ARTHUR
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT HART, ARTHUR DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, DAVID SERVED NOV-29-1994, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HART, ARTHUR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HART, ARTHUR $955.00 RENT, $300.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $202.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,457.00
